body:
Daily health 2026-05-04
- Cadence: ok (content/projects/research supervisors all posted)
- Alerts (24h): 0
- Stalls: 0 over 24h threshold; 3 open content tasks to content-domain-lead (backlog refill + 2 research-driven prompts) all <1h old, on track
- Note: Tier-3 backbone healthy. Calendar gap resolved same-day. Two watch items: notebook_id TBD in research PRD, 2 NLM prompts pending live query.
Dispatching notion-db-manager for task: Full sync all 6 databases
Started: Daily health check 2026-05-23

- Alerts (24h): 0 — all clear across content/projects/research/meta.
- Stalls: 0 — 2 aged task messages in projects (2026-05-04 BLOCKER, 2026-05-05 SPRINT START) both resolved same-day per supervisor done digests.
- Note: Weekend health pass. No red signals. Research supervisor cadence is the watch item — last confirmed post predates 2026-05-08; verify it ran this week.

Daily health 2026-05-23 complete. Weekend run — all signals green. No alerts, no stalls, no active supervisors (expected Sat). Watch item: daily-research-supervisor cadence not confirmed this week — first weekday run next week should verify.

Pre-flight (dry-run, confirmed:false) for week 2026-W23: 14 diffs selected, 14 PASS, 0 BLOCKED. No diff targets a gated path. All hunk anchors matched exactly once (verified by exact-context match; proposer uses descriptive @@ headers, so application will be context-exact rather than `git apply`). Awaiting user confirmation before any write.

Applied 14 diffs from week 2026-W23. Skipped: 0. Blocked: 0. Files touched: CLAUDE.md (keystone delegation + conversation protocol), prds/content-pipeline.md, and 9 agents (daily-content-supervisor ×2, daily-content-pipeline ×3, kanban-secretary, daily-research-supervisor, master-overseer, content/project/research-domain-lead, daily-project-supervisor). Every change logged with SHA-256 before/after; multi-diff sha chains verified. Proposal frontmatter set applied: true. Rollback available via /rollback-proposal week-23.

Applied 8 diffs from week 2026-W24 (Tier-1 directed-reply contract). Skipped: 0. Blocked: 0. CLAUDE.md gains the delegator brief field + "Replying to your delegator" contract; linkedin/instagram/x-writer, humanizer, scrum-master, domain-researcher now reply directed to their delegator. Logged to audit/mutations.jsonl (22 total entries across W23+W24). Remaining Tier-1 workers to follow the same pattern (mechanical, listed in proposal out-of-scope). Rollback: /rollback-proposal week-24.

DSR composed for 2026-06-17 but Telegram send failed — outbound to api.telegram.org blocked by sandbox proxy (HTTP 403 on CONNECT). DSR saved to logs/dsr/2026-06-17.md so it isn't lost. Creds file is present and valid (not the example); this is a network egress restriction, not a creds issue. Needs api.telegram.org allowlisted for the shell, or run the send from an unrestricted environment.

EOD DSR retry for 2026-06-17 — Telegram send still blocked (HTTP 403 on CONNECT to api.telegram.org via sandbox proxy). Same egress restriction as the 12:08 run, not a creds issue (creds present + valid). DSR refreshed and saved to logs/dsr/2026-06-17.md. Needs api.telegram.org allowlisted for the shell, or run the send from an unrestricted environment.
Started: daily-health 2026-06-18

Daily health 2026-06-18
- Cadence: ok — all 3 supervisors ran today (content 03:34Z, project 03:55Z, research 03:52Z)
- Alerts (24h): 4 across 2 channels — content×2 (research corpus 16d stale / 4th consecutive no-dispatch; queue saturation 17 ready posts unrotated), meta×2 (Telegram egress blocked twice on 06-17, api.telegram.org 403 via sandbox proxy)
- Stalls: 2 — refresh-accessibility-ai-0616: task posted 06-16T04:28 (supervisor→domain-lead) + subtask 06-16T05:04 (domain-lead→domain-researcher), neither returned done; 48h open, confirmed failed by EOD/morning-sweep reports
- Note: RED — alerts ≥3 and stalls ≥2; cross-posting to all-hands. Content pipeline structurally blocked (stale corpus + saturated queue). research-domain-lead re-dispatched today (ref refresh-accessibility-ai-0618) handling write directly — no done yet but < 24h. Telegram egress needs api.telegram.org allowlisted in sandbox.
Started: daily-health 2026-06-19

- Stalls: 0 (content pipeline task <1h, not a stall; prior 0616/0617 stalls confirmed resolved)
- Note: GREEN. Yesterday's RED cleared — research corpus refreshed (notes age=1d), 0 active alerts. Carry-forwards non-blocking: firecrawl creds (401), queue saturation 21 ready posts (human scheduling decision needed), Telegram DSR egress blocked (sandbox 403).
